# composite

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/composite"
```

Package composite generates composite charts using the midpoint method for relationship analysis. Each planet position in the composite chart is the midpoint of the two individuals' corresponding planet longitudes.

CalcCompositeChart is the main entry point, accepting a CompositeInput with both charts' birth data and returning a CompositeChart with positions and aspects.

<a name="Midpoint"></a>
## func [Midpoint](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/composite.go#L147>)

```go
func Midpoint(lon1, lon2 float64) float64
```

Midpoint calculates the midpoint between two ecliptic longitudes \(exported for reuse\)

<a name="CompositeChart"></a>
## type [CompositeChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/composite.go#L13-L18>)

CompositeChart holds the composite \(midpoint\) chart for two people

```go
type CompositeChart struct {
    Planets []models.PlanetPosition `json:"planets"`
    Houses  []float64               `json:"houses"`
    Angles  models.AnglesInfo       `json:"angles"`
    Aspects []models.AspectInfo     `json:"aspects"`
}
```

<a name="CalcCompositeChart"></a>
### func [CalcCompositeChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/composite.go#L36>)

```go
func CalcCompositeChart(input CompositeInput) (*CompositeChart, error)
```

CalcCompositeChart computes the composite chart using the midpoint method. Each composite planet position is the midpoint of the two natal positions. House cusps use the midpoint of the two natal MCs to derive RAMC.

<a name="CompositeInput"></a>
## type [CompositeInput](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/composite.go#L21-L31>)

CompositeInput configures a composite chart calculation

```go
type CompositeInput struct {
    Person1Lat  float64
    Person1Lon  float64
    Person1JD   float64
    Person2Lat  float64
    Person2Lon  float64
    Person2JD   float64
    Planets     []models.PlanetID
    OrbConfig   models.OrbConfig
    HouseSystem models.HouseSystem
}
```

<a name="DavisonChart"></a>
## type [DavisonChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/davison.go#L12-L20>)

DavisonChart holds the Davison relationship chart, which is a real chart cast for the time\-midpoint and space\-midpoint of two birth charts.

```go
type DavisonChart struct {
    MidpointJD  float64                 `json:"midpoint_jd"`
    MidpointLat float64                 `json:"midpoint_lat"`
    MidpointLon float64                 `json:"midpoint_lon"`
    Planets     []models.PlanetPosition `json:"planets"`
    Houses      []float64               `json:"houses"`
    Angles      models.AnglesInfo       `json:"angles"`
    Aspects     []models.AspectInfo     `json:"aspects"`
}
```

<a name="CalcDavisonChart"></a>
### func [CalcDavisonChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/composite/davison.go#L26>)

```go
func CalcDavisonChart(input CompositeInput) (*DavisonChart, error)
```

CalcDavisonChart computes the Davison relationship chart. It calculates the midpoint in time \(JD\) and space \(lat/lon\) between two birth data sets, then casts a real natal chart for that midpoint moment and location.
